title: Apple sues OpenAI for alleged theft of confidential info — and says that’s just ‘the tip of the iceberg’
summary: Apple claims OpenAI stole confidential information and alleges misconduct is "normalized and exemplified by leadership" at the company. The lawsuit suggests systemic issues at OpenAI extend beyond a single incident.
content: The iPhone maker claims “misconduct is normalized and exemplified by leadership” at OpenAI.

zh.title: 苹果起诉OpenAI窃取机密信息——声称这只是"冰山一角"
zh.summary: 苹果声称OpenAI窃取了机密信息，并指控不当行为在公司内"被规范化并由领导层示范"。该诉讼表明OpenAI的系统性问题超出了单一事件的范围。

title: Meta’s stock roars back to life as it notches its best week in years
summary: Meta's stock achieved its best week in years, driven by investor optimism about the company's new low-cost AI pricing and infrastructure plans. The surge reflects growing market confidence in Meta's AI competitive position.
content: Investors are bullish on Meta’s new low-cost AI pricing and infrastructure plans.

zh.title: Meta股票强势反弹，创造多年来最好的一周
zh.summary: Meta股票创造了多年来最好的一周，由投资者对公司新的低成本人工智能定价和基础设施计划的乐观态度驱动。这一激增反映了市场对Meta人工智能竞争地位的增长信心。

title: Trump admin eases export controls for UAE; Warren blasts 'corrupt' provision
summary: The Trump administration is easing export controls for UAE exports involving MGX, which used a Trump-family-linked stablecoin for a $2 billion Binance investment. Senator Warren criticized the move as corrupt, raising conflict-of-interest concerns.
content: The Commerce Department will favorably review exports involving MGX, which used a stablecoin linked to President Trump's family for a $2B Binance investment.

zh.title: 特朗普政府放宽对阿联酋的出口管制；沃伦抨击"腐败"条款
zh.summary: 特朗普政府正在放宽对涉及MGX的阿联酋出口的管制，该公司曾使用与特朗普家族相关的稳定币进行20亿美元的币安投资。参议员沃伦批评这一举措为腐败，引发了利益冲突的担忧。

title: The AI race is shifting from bigger models to cheaper, smarter systems
summary: The AI industry is shifting focus from pure model scale to task-specific, cost-effective, and controllable systems that prioritize practical value over benchmark performance. This trend reflects maturing organizational approaches to AI deployment.
content: Companies are starting to choose AI models by task, cost and control, not just leaderboard rank.

zh.title: 人工智能竞赛从更大规模的模型转向更便宜、更聪明的系统
zh.summary: 人工智能行业正在从纯粹的模型规模转变为针对特定任务、成本效益高且可控的系统，优先考虑实际价值而非基准性能。这一趋势反映了组织在人工智能部署方面的日趋成熟。

title: How Apple stock rode the AI rollercoaster to record highs in 1 chart
summary: Apple's stock has reached record highs as Wall Street rewards the company's measured AI strategy, contrasting with competitors' aggressive spending. The market is validating Apple's focus on measured innovation over racing for performance gains.
content: Apple stayed true to itself in the AI race, and Wall Street is finally rewarding the stock for it.

zh.title: 苹果股票如何乘着人工智能浪潮达到创纪录高位
zh.summary: 苹果公司的股票达到历史新高，因为华尔街认可了该公司谨慎的人工智能战略，与竞争对手的激进支出形成鲜明对比。市场正在认可苹果公司专注于谨慎创新而不是追求性能收益的方向。

title: Meta's stock has best week since early 2024 as optimism builds around AI strategy
summary: Meta achieved its best trading week since early 2024 following the release of two new AI models under the Muse Spark family, led by Alexandr Wang. Investor optimism reflects confidence in Meta's AI strategy and competitive capabilities.
content: Meta released two AI models this week as part of its new Muse Spark family, under the leadership of Alexandr Wang.

zh.title: 由于AI战略前景看好，Meta股票创2024年初以来最佳周表现
zh.summary: Meta在Muse Spark系列下发布两个新AI模型后，实现了自2024年初以来的最佳交易周，由Alexandr Wang领导。投资者的乐观情绪反映了对Meta的AI战略和竞争能力的信心。

title: Next week brings earnings and inflation data amid resumption of U.S.-Iran hostilities. Here's what's ahead
summary: Earnings season begins next week alongside June inflation data release, while U.S.-Iran tensions reignite and threaten market stability. Investors face both economic indicators and geopolitical uncertainty in the week ahead.
content: Investors are anticipating the start of earnings season and the release of June inflation data, just as the U.S-Iran war threatens to reassert itself.

zh.title: 下周美伊冲突升级之际，将公布财报和通胀数据，以下是即将发生的情况
zh.summary: 随着6月通胀数据的公布，财报季下周开始，而美伊紧张局势重燃并威胁市场稳定。投资者在下周面临经济指标和地缘政治不确定性。

title: Buy these dividend-paying real estate stocks ahead of earnings, says UBS
summary: UBS recommends buying dividend-paying real estate stocks, particularly in senior housing and skilled nursing facilities, ahead of earnings season. The financial advisory points to strong fundamentals in these healthcare real estate sectors.
content: Senior housing and skilled nursing facilities are enjoying healthy fundamentals, UBS said.

zh.title: UBS建议在财报季前购买这些分红房地产股票
zh.summary: UBS建议在财报季前购买分红房地产股票，特别是在老年人住房和技能护理设施领域。该财务顾问指出这些医疗保健房地产部门的基本面强劲。

title: OpenAI power consolidates under co-founder Greg Brockman ahead of prospective IPO
summary: Greg Brockman's leadership role at OpenAI has become more prominent following Fidji Simo's departure due to health reasons. This consolidation of power comes as the company prepares for a potential initial public offering. The shift signals clearer organizational structure ahead of the IPO.
content: With Fidji Simo's official departure from OpenAI due to a chronic medical issue, Greg Brockman's role has become clearer.

zh.title: 在潜在IPO前，OpenAI权力在联合创始人格雷格·布罗克曼手中巩固
zh.summary: 由于菲季·西莫因健康原因离职，格雷格·布罗克曼在OpenAI的领导角色变得更加突出。随着公司为潜在的首次公开募股做准备，权力的巩固应运而生。这一转变预示着在IPO前组织结构更加清晰。

title: The ETF market is pushing the limits of the leverage it can handle. SK Hynix is the latest example
summary: Single-stock ETFs with heavy leverage are pushing risk management boundaries as the market moves beyond traditional low-cost index funds. SK Hynix has become a recent example of this trend. Regulators and investors are watching whether the market can sustainably handle the increased leverage.
content: The original ETF boom was about low cost, tax-efficient core index funds. Now single-stock ETFs are upping risk, with leverage getting 'a little carried away.'

zh.title: ETF市场正在推动它能承受的杠杆上限。SK海力士是最新的例子
zh.summary: 随着市场超越传统低成本指数基金，单只股票ETF的高杠杆正在推动风险管理的边界。SK海力士成为了这一趋势的最近例子。监管机构和投资者正在关注市场是否能够可持续地承受增加的杠杆。

title: Stocks rise as investors await the start of earnings season — here's what to expect
summary: Stock markets are rising as investors prepare for the upcoming earnings season, which will provide critical insight into corporate profitability. The Investing Club's daily updates offer traders actionable analysis in final trading hours. Earnings announcements are expected to drive market volatility in the coming weeks.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 随着投资者期待财报季的开始，股票上升——以下是预期
zh.summary: 随着投资者为即将到来的财报季做准备，股市上升，这将提供对企业盈利能力的关键洞察。投资俱乐部的每日更新为交易者提供了在最后交易时段的可执行分析。预计财报公告将在未来几周内推动市场波动。

title: A hedge-fund trade blamed for a massive market blowup in 2024 has made a big comeback, Goldman Sachs says
summary: The currency-market carry trade, which contributed to a major market disruption in 2024, has resurfaced at historically high levels according to Goldman Sachs. This risky strategy involves borrowing in low-interest currencies and investing in higher-yielding markets. The comeback raises concerns about potential systemic risks to financial stability.
content: The currency-market carry trade is back — and bigger than it’s been in many years.

zh.title: 高盛表示，因2024年市场大崩盘而备受指责的对冲基金交易已强势回归
zh.summary: 根据高盛，对2024年市场重大中断有贡献的货币市场套息交易已重新出现在历史高位。这种风险策略涉及在低利率货币中借款并投资于收益率更高的市场。这种交易的回归引发了对金融稳定性潜在系统性风险的担忧。

title: Prepare for the Fed to undo rate cuts that stabilized the economy, expert cautions
summary: RBC Wealth Management warns that the Federal Reserve may reverse the rate cuts made in 2025 that provided economic stability, or maintain rates at current levels. The Fed's next moves will depend on economic conditions and inflation trends. These policy shifts could significantly impact financial markets and economic growth.
content: The Federal Reserve likely will take back all the 2025 ‘insurance cuts’ or not raise interest rates at all, according to RBC Wealth Management.

zh.title: 专家警告：准备好美联储撤销稳定经济的降息
zh.summary: 加拿大皇家银行财富管理部门警告，美联储可能会逆转2025年提供经济稳定的降息措施，或将利率维持在当前水平。美联储的下一步举措将取决于经济状况和通货膨胀趋势。这些政策转变可能会对金融市场和经济增长产生重大影响。

title: ‘Trump accounts’ are great — if you’re already rich
summary: Trump Accounts offer significant benefits primarily for wealthy individuals while providing limited advantages for average Americans. The financial products are designed with features that favor those with substantial existing assets. Consumer advocates warn that middle-income and lower-income families may find better alternatives.
content: They’re a poor deal for most other people.

zh.title: "特朗普账户"很不错——如果你已经很富有的话
zh.summary: 特朗普账户主要为富人提供显著优势，而为普通美国人提供的优势有限。这些金融产品的设计特点有利于拥有大量现有资产的人。消费者倡导者警告称，中等收入和低收入家庭可能会找到更好的替代品。

title: SK Hynix’s stock scores double-digit pop in Nasdaq debut
summary: SK Hynix, a South Korean semiconductor memory manufacturer, achieved double-digit stock gains during its Nasdaq debut of American depositary receipts. The strong opening reflects investor confidence in the company's products and market position. The listing marks significant expansion of the company's access to U.S. capital markets.
content: The South Korean memory company’s new American depositary receipts begin trading on Friday.

zh.title: SK Hynix纳斯达克首秀股价大幅上涨
zh.summary: SK Hynix是一家韩国半导体存储制造商，在纳斯达克美国存托凭证首次上市期间取得了两位数的股票涨幅。强劲的开盘表现反映了投资者对该公司产品和市场地位的信心。该上市标志着该公司进入美国资本市场的重大扩展。

title: ‘An American tragedy’ in the making: The majority of small-business owners will retire in the next decade. What happens to their workers?
summary: A majority of American small-business owners are expected to retire within the next decade, potentially resulting in widespread business closures without succession plans. This trend threatens job losses, economic disruption, and loss of accumulated institutional knowledge. Experts warn of significant economic and employment consequences if succession planning is not addressed.
content: “It’s a loss to the economy, to jobs, to decades of institutional knowledge when a business simply turns off the lights”

zh.title: "美国悲剧"在酝酿：大多数小企业主将在未来十年内退休。他们的员工会怎样？
zh.summary: 大多数美国小企业主预计将在未来十年内退休，在没有继承计划的情况下可能导致大规模企业倒闭。这一趋势威胁着大量失业、经济混乱和制度知识的丧失。专家警告，如果不解决继承规划问题，将带来重大的经济和就业后果。

title: Trump Accounts may help foster children build a financial safety net. What to know
summary: Trump Accounts could potentially help foster children build long-term financial security and savings, according to advocates promoting the initiative. However, concerns remain about account flexibility, accessibility, and whether terms adequately serve vulnerable populations. Implementation details will be crucial to determining whether the program delivers promised benefits.
content: Advocates say that Trump Accounts for foster children may end up being helpful, as long as concerns about flexibility and accessibility are addressed.

zh.title: Trump账户可能帮助寄养儿童建立财务安全网。需要了解的事项
zh.summary: 根据推动该倡议的倡导者，Trump账户可能帮助寄养儿童建立长期财务安全和储蓄。不过，人们仍然担忧账户的灵活性、可获取性以及条款是否能充分服务于弱势群体。实施细节将对确定该计划是否能实现承诺的效益至关重要。

title: Trump purges Election Assistance Commission members, months before midterms
summary: President Trump has removed members from the Election Assistance Commission, citing a Supreme Court precedent allowing the President to fire certain federal commissioners. The purge occurs months before midterm elections, raising questions about election administration impartiality. The removals follow the same legal justification used in the Louise Slaughter FTC case.
content: The White House said the Supreme Court's ruling allowing President Trump to fire FTC Commissioner Louise Slaughter provided the precedent for the removals.

zh.title: 特朗普清除选举援助委员会成员，距中期选举仅数月
zh.summary: 特朗普总统援引最高法院判例，以该判例允许总统解除某些联邦专员为由，从选举援助委员会中撤销了成员。这次清除发生在中期选举前数月，引发了对选举管理公正性的质疑。这些撤销遵循了在Louise Slaughter联邦贸易委员会案中使用的相同法律理由。

title: Looking for your first credit card? The Chase Freedom Rise earns 3% cash back for a limited time
summary: The Chase Freedom Rise credit card offers new cardholders a limited-time 3% cash-back bonus on dining purchases, along with other rewards and benefits. The card is designed for people building or rebuilding their credit history. The promotional rate is temporary, so interested applicants should review terms before applying.
content: Building or rebuilding your credit? The Chase Freedom Rise offers a limited-time 3% cash-back bonus on dining, plus rewards and perks for new cardholders.

zh.title: 寻找你的第一张信用卡？Chase Freedom Rise信用卡限时提供3%返现
zh.summary: Chase Freedom Rise信用卡向新持卡人提供限时3%餐饮购物返现奖励，以及其他奖励和福利。该卡面向正在建立或重建信用记录的人群。促销利率为期限制，有意申请者应在申请前查看条款。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: SK Hynix, Meta, WD-40, Delta, Vodafone & more
summary: Major stock movements occurred during midday trading, with SK Hynix, Meta, WD-40, Delta, and Vodafone among the biggest movers. The intraday volatility reflects market reactions to earnings reports, economic data, or sector-specific news. Investors should monitor these stocks for continued momentum or reversal patterns.
content: These are some of the stocks posting the largest moves midday.

zh.title: 盘中波动最大的股票：SK海力士、Meta、WD-40、达美航空、沃达丰等
zh.summary: 盘中交易期间出现了重大股票波动，SK海力士、Meta、WD-40、达美航空和沃达丰等是涨幅最大的。盘中波动反映了市场对收益报告、经济数据或特定行业新闻的反应。投资者应监测这些股票的后续走势或反转模式。

title: Senate Democrats want hearings on Trump’s crypto holdings and foreign investors
summary: Senate Democrats have called for hearings to examine President Trump's cryptocurrency holdings, including $1.4 billion in Trump family crypto income and potential foreign investor involvement. The inquiry focuses on unidentified investors and a reported UAE-backed stake in World Liberty Financial. The request raises concerns about conflicts of interest and foreign influence.
content: Democratic Senators cited $1.4 billion in Trump family crypto income, unidentified investors and a reported UAE-backed stake in World Liberty Financial.

zh.title: 参议院民主党人要求就特朗普的加密货币持有和外国投资者举行听证会
zh.summary: 参议院民主党人呼吁举行听证会，审查特朗普总统的加密货币持有，包括14亿美元的特朗普家族加密收入和潜在的外国投资者参与。调查重点关注身份不明的投资者和据报道由阿联酋支持的世界自由财务公司的股份。该请求引发了对利益冲突和外国影响的担忧。

title: Traders fall back in love with Meta. Here's where bulls see it going
summary: Meta Platforms is experiencing renewed investor enthusiasm driven by optimism around its artificial intelligence initiatives and products. After nearly a year of stock underperformance, bullish analysts see significant upside potential based on the company's AI strategy. The $1.7 trillion market-cap company is positioning itself as a leader in AI technology development.
content: Meta Platform's AI efforts are looking like the recipe for a comeback after an almost year-long drought in shares of the $1.7 trillion market-cap company.

zh.title: 交易者重新爱上Meta。以下是看涨者认为它将走向何处
zh.summary: Meta平台因对人工智能计划和产品的乐观情绪而获得投资者的重新关注。经过近一年的股票表现不佳后，看涨分析师基于公司的人工智能战略看到了重大上升潜力。这家市值1.7万亿美元的公司正将自己定位为人工智能技术开发的领导者。

title: Corporate America is pumping $1 trillion into stock buybacks — but look at what insiders are doing
summary: U.S. corporations are investing $1 trillion in stock buyback programs while company insiders are simultaneously increasing their own share purchases in selected companies. This divergence between corporate buyback strategies and insider trading activity may signal executive confidence or caution depending on specific cases. Twenty-two stocks are highlighted as backed by both corporate buybacks and insider cash.
content: These 22 U.S. stocks are backed by company buybacks and insider cash.

zh.title: 美国企业正在向股票回购中投入1万亿美元——但看看内部人士在做什么
zh.summary: 美国公司向股票回购计划投入1万亿美元，同时公司内部人士也在增加对特定公司股票的购买。公司回购战略与内部人士交易活动之间的差异可能表明管理层的信心或谨慎，取决于具体情况。二十二只股票被列为同时获得公司回购和内部人士资金支持的股票。

title: Seize the advantage in Micron options against the SK Hynix listing, Jeff Kilburg says
summary: Analyst Jeff Kilburg suggests strategic positioning in Micron options ahead of SK Hynix's listing, as heavy options trading signals significant repositioning in the memory chip sector. The activity reflects shifting competitive dynamics between major semiconductor manufacturers.
content: MU options saw massive activity Friday, indicating heavy hedging or directional bets as the memory chip trade repositions.

zh.title: 杰夫·基尔堡表示：在SK海力士上市前利用美光期权抢占优势
zh.summary: 分析师杰夫·基尔堡建议在SK海力士上市前战略性地布局美光期权，因为大量期权交易信号表明内存芯片领域的重大重新布局。这一活动反映了主要半导体制造商之间竞争动态的转变。

title: How the U.S.-Iran deal set the stage for renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz
summary: Contradictory U.S.-Iran interpretations of their memorandum of understanding have escalated tensions and renewed fighting over the strategically critical Strait of Hormuz. The dispute highlights fundamental disagreements between the nations.
content: The U.S. and Iran's contradictory interperations of the memorandum of understanding have led to renewed fighting over the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 美伊协议如何为霍尔木兹海峡战事升级埋下伏笔
zh.summary: 美伊两国对谅解备忘录的相互矛盾解释升级了紧张局势，并重新引发了对战略性关键航道霍尔木兹海峡的争夺。这场争议突显了两国之间的根本分歧。

title: As bank earnings approach, a market anomaly emerges
summary: The Financial Select Sector Index trades at 15.5 times forward earnings, roughly 1.25 times cheaper than 2024 valuations, creating an unusual market opportunity. The valuation gap is notable as banking earnings season approaches.
content: The Financial Select Sector Index trades at roughly 15.5 times forward earnings — about a turn and a quarter cheaper than where it stood in 2024.

zh.title: 银行财报即将发布，市场出现异常
zh.summary: 金融精选行业指数的远期市盈率为15.5倍，比2024年估值便宜约1.25倍，呈现出不寻常的市场机遇。随着银行财报季的临近，这一估值差异更显突出。

title: Air taxi company Beta wraps first test flights in U.S. government's pilot program
summary: Beta completed its first test flights in the U.S. government's electric air taxi pilot program, positioning itself among competitors racing for FAA certification. The milestone represents progress toward commercial passenger operations.
content: Beta is one of several electric air taxi makers racing to secure Federal Aviation Administration certification and start flying passengers commercially.

zh.title: 空中出租车公司Beta完成美国政府试点项目首轮测试飞行
zh.summary: Beta完成了美国政府电动空中出租车试点项目的首轮测试飞行，在争夺FAA认证的竞争中占据一席之地。这个里程碑标志着朝商业客运运营目标迈进。

title: Man nearly sucked out of window mid-air on Ryanair plane, passengers say
summary: A passenger on a Ryanair flight nearly got sucked out of a cabin window, with his wife holding his legs for approximately five minutes to prevent the loss. Officials are investigating the incident involving apparent loss of cabin pressure.
content: The man's wife held onto his legs for around five minutes to stop him from being sucked out, officials say.

zh.title: 男乘客在瑞安航空飞行中差点被吸出窗外，乘客称
zh.summary: 瑞安航空一架飞机上的乘客差点被客舱窗口吸出，其妻子抓住他的双腿约五分钟以防止坠落。官员们正在调查这起涉及明显失压的事件。

title: Major car firms found not to have installed emissions-cheating devices
summary: A High Court judge ruled that major car manufacturers did not install devices designed to cheat emissions tests, clearing them of fraud allegations. The decision represents a legal victory against emissions cheating claims.
content: A High Court judge said some major car manufacturers did not install a device to cheat emissions testing.

zh.title: 主要汽车制造商被认定未安装排放欺骗装置
zh.summary: 高等法院法官裁定主要汽车制造商未安装用于欺骗排放测试的装置，这消除了对他们的欺诈指控。该判决代表了对排放欺骗指控的法律胜利。

title: Kraken is rebuilding its app around agentic trading as crypto exchanges evolve beyond crypto
summary: Kraken is redesigning its application around agentic trading capabilities as cryptocurrency exchanges expand beyond traditional trading functionality. The shift reflects evolving market demands and competitive positioning in the crypto industry.
content: Kraken is rebuilding its app around agentic trading, the company told CNBC exclusively.

zh.title: Kraken正在围绕代理交易重建应用程序，随着加密交易所功能超越加密

title: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
summary: The European Union has threatened Meta with fines, alleging that Facebook and Instagram features like infinite scroll deliberately encourage compulsive use and unhealthy habits. EU regulators are taking action under digital protection laws designed to prevent harm to users. This enforcement signals increased scrutiny of social media design practices across the platform.
content: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".

zh.title: 欧盟因Facebook和Instagram"成瘾性"威胁对Meta罚款

title: Delta expects higher airfare to last, bringing 2026 profit goal in reach, CEO says
summary: Delta Air Lines reported that elevated airfares are expected to persist, which the CEO says will help the airline reach its 2026 profit targets. Higher fares signal sustained demand and pricing power in the aviation sector.
content: Delta is the first of the U.S. airlines to report second-quarter results.

title: Meta found to breach EU laws with 'addictive' Instagram, Facebook designs
summary: The European Union determined in a preliminary report that Meta's Instagram and Facebook designs violate EU digital protection laws through features designed to encourage compulsive use. This finding formally establishes that Meta has breached European regulations intended to protect user wellbeing. The conclusion could lead to significant fines and mandatory changes to the platforms' design practices.
content: Instagram and Facebook's "addictive" designs have put Meta in breach of the European Union's digital laws, the EU concluded Friday in a preliminary report.

zh.title: Meta因"成瘾性"Instagram和Facebook设计被认定违反欧盟法律

content: Wall Street is coming off a winning day, following a jump in chipmakers and falling oil prices.

zh.title: 芯片股反弹后股指期货下跌；软银股价飙升11%，亚洲科技股涨势强劲：实时更新
zh.summary: 亚洲科技股大幅上涨，软银股价上升11%，而美国股指期货在芯片制造商股票强势上涨和油价下跌后有所下跌。市场走势反映了地区间持续的波动性和板块轮动。这些发展凸显了投资者对科技公司的关注，同时能源成本也在变化。

title: Vapes to have less enticing names to protect children, under UK plans
summary: The UK is consulting on regulations to prevent vape companies from using appealing flavor names and descriptions that attract children to vaping products, aiming to reduce youth experimentation.
content: People are being consulted about plans to stop vape companies using of enticing flavour descriptions that "attract" children into experimenting.

zh.title: 根据英国计划，电子烟将采用更不吸引人的名称以保护儿童
zh.summary: 英国正在咨询相关法规，以防止电子烟公司使用吸引儿童使用电子烟产品的具有吸引力的香料名称和描述，旨在减少青少年尝试。

title: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
summary: The Advertising Standards Authority has cracked down on misleading ads for portable air conditioners that falsely claim to cool rooms in 90 seconds, highlighting deceptive marketing spread online.
content: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.

zh.title: "90秒制冷"——在互联网上泛滥的假便携式空调
zh.summary: 广告标准管理局已对误导性广告进行了打击，这些广告虚假宣传便携式空调能在90秒内冷却房间，突显了在线传播的欺骗性营销。
